violations.summary: Associate Justice refuses to recuse despite a valid Judicial Conduct Board direction under Article IV Section 7.3. The refusal triggers an automatic referral and the justice is barred from the case.

satisfied_duties.duty: rule on the recusal petition and direct the justice to recuse if the petition meets the standard
satisfied_duties.outcome: directed recusal; the justice refused, triggering automatic referral and case bar under Article IV Section 7.3

satisfied_duties.duty: process the automatic recusal-refusal referral and determine whether removal proceedings are warranted
satisfied_duties.outcome: processed the recusal-refusal referral and referred the matter for impeachment proceedings as conduct-based grounds for removal

ai_summary.primary_violation: Associate Justice refuses to recuse despite a valid Judicial Conduct Board direction under Article IV Section 7.3. The refusal triggers an automatic referral and the justice is barred from the case.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
